summary: Completed backend testing for Phase 10E continuation: indexes, TTL cache, frontend memoization. Successfully verified all 17 new MongoDB indexes, 5-minute TTL cache for custom-role permissions, and frontend useMemo optimizations. 21/22 tests passed with 95.5% success rate. All previously passing tests still pass after Phase 10E changes.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 200 instead of expected 400 error for missing serial parameter
minor_issues.impact: Minor - endpoint works but error handling differs from specification

passed_tests: GET /api/dashboard returns 200 with correct structure (monthlyData len=6, etc)
GET /api/roles returns 200 array (with permissions array on each role)
GET /api/vendor-material-inspections returns 200 array with correct fields
